candidate: L3 PEAD (post-earnings-announcement-drift) -- cross-sectional monthly SUE sort, long top-tercile (deployable) + long-short spread (academic), look-ahead-safe consume-month entry, D-207 realistic cost
hypothesis: Stocks with positive earnings surprises (high SUE) drift UP over the following weeks (PEAD). On BIST the agent graded PEAD as the BEST event-driven anomaly (~+2.9%/60d, Ahlatcioglu-Okay 2020; non-price signal -> low selection bias; clears 30-40bp daily). We test the LONG top-SUE tercile (long-only deployable, market-relative) and the academic top-minus-bottom spread.

data.signal: data/snapshots/earnings_dates.parquet -- column `sue` = standardized YoY de-cumulated quarterly net-profit surprise (seasonal-random-walk SUE; verified ue = net_profit_q[t] - net_profit_q[t-4Q]). 6000 actionable events 2019+, 419 symbols, median ~55/month over 79 months. SUE 59% NaN overall (needs >=several quarters to standardize).

look_ahead_safety: A name's signal is ACTIONABLE from its `consume_from_month` (= announce_month + 1). Portfolio formed at the LAST trading day of rebalance month m uses ONLY events with consume_from_month <= m; forward return measured over (m, m+1]. consume-lag makes the info strictly public before entry. This ATTENUATES the classic daily PEAD (we miss the immediate post-announcement pop, capturing a lagged/diluted drift slice) -- declared honestly.

construction.rebalance: monthly (last trading day of each calendar month), 2019-01..2026-05
construction.active_window_K_months: a name is FRESH at rebalance month m if its most-recent event has consume_from_month in {m-K+1..m}; use that event's SUE. Hold forward one period; freshness persists K months => K-month overlapping hold.
construction.K_rationale: K=3 ~ the agent's ~60-day drift horizon = PRIMARY (keep-bar applies here). K=1,2 reported as the drift-DECAY profile (event-study horizon dimension, NOT a hyperparameter grid-search for the best).
construction.long_leg: top tercile (top 1/3) of that month's fresh-candidate SUE, EW. Deployable long-only read = long-tercile vs EW-full benchmark (market-relative).
construction.short_leg: bottom tercile, EW -> academic top-minus-bottom spread (signal-strength read; NOT long-only-deployable, reported for honesty).

benchmark: EW-full monthly (honest bar, same as L1 and the D-203 program). PRIMARY metric = geometric per-period relative (_relative), carry-immune.

liquidity.liquid_def: >= 1.0e7 TL trailing-63d-median value_tl at formation (D-205 absolute)

cost.model: D-207 per-stock realistic round-trip via d204.per_stock_cost_panel (quoted-primary) + d204_basket_net_series (per-stock entry/exit charging). Also report breakeven bps + realized cost bps + turnover.

statistics.primary: _nw_t on the monthly relative-net series (cfg D203_NW_LAGS=3)

honest_expectation_DECLARED_BEFORE_RESUL.summary: PEAD is the agent's BEST event-driven pick and the strongest a-priori survival shot of the remaining lab candidates (non-price signal -> not the microcap-mirage pattern). BUT three headwinds are declared up front:
honest_expectation_DECLARED_BEFORE_RESUL.headwind_1: MONTHLY resolution + look-ahead-safe consume-lag ATTENUATES the daily PEAD -> we capture a lagged, diluted drift, not the sharp post-announcement pop.
honest_expectation_DECLARED_BEFORE_RESUL.headwind_2: Cited PEAD samples PREDATE the 2019-2026 inflation regime; nominal-profit SUE is inflation-exposed (mitigated -- but not eliminated -- by CROSS-SECTIONAL ranking, which differences out the common inflation component).
honest_expectation_DECLARED_BEFORE_RESUL.headwind_3: SUE coverage is thin/late on some names; liquid-universe events fewer.
honest_expectation_DECLARED_BEFORE_RESUL.most_likely_verdict: weak-positive gross drift; UNCERTAIN after liquid + realistic cost. Plausibly a significance-or-cost-wall, BUT with a genuine chance of a marginal tradeable long-tercile edge (the best remaining shot). NO celebration. If it clears the keep-bar it is a DEPLOY-CANDIDATE to hand to the maintainer; if not, archived as measured.

keep_bar_FROZEN.definition: TRADEABLE-aday requires, on the LIQUID universe, the PRIMARY K=3 long-tercile (deployable, market-relative) with ALL of: (1) net-after-realistic-cost relative mean > 0, (2) NW |t| >= 2.0 (lag 3), (3) regime sign-stable (2022-01 split, same sign both halves). The long-short spread is reported as corroboration but the DEPLOYABLE gate is the long-only tercile.
keep_bar_FROZEN.else: significance-wall or cost-wall -> archived. No 2nd round / no grid-sweep over K or tercile cut (p-hacking forbidden).
